---
title: "Etapa 3 — Mapa de distribución del modelo ganador"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)

MAPS_ROOT <- "../../data/outputs/sdm_maps"
```

## Selección del modelo ganador

```{r winner-summary}
winner <- readr::read_csv(file.path(MAPS_ROOT, "winner_summary.csv"),
                          show_col_types = FALSE)
knitr::kable(
  winner,
  digits = 4,
  caption = "Modelo ganador bajo el esquema dual TSS+FNR (τ_FNR principal)."
)
```

## Mapa de distribución del ganador

```{r winner-map, out.width = "100%"}
manifest <- readr::read_csv(file.path(MAPS_ROOT, "manifest.csv"),
                            show_col_types = FALSE)
winner_png <- manifest |> filter(is_winner) |> pull(png_path)
knitr::include_graphics(winner_png)
```

## Sobrevivientes del filtro τ_FNR (comparación visual)

```{r survivors, out.width = "100%", results = "asis"}
survivors <- manifest |> filter(!is_winner)
if (nrow(survivors) == 0) {
  cat("_Solo el ganador pasa el filtro principal._")
} else {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(survivors))) {
    cat("\n\n### ", survivors$run_id[i], "\n\n", sep = "")
    cat("![", survivors$run_id[i], "](", survivors$png_path[i], ")\n", sep = "")
  }
}
```

## Robustez de τ_FNR

```{r robustness}
rob <- readr::read_csv(file.path(MAPS_ROOT, "tau_fnr_robustness.csv"),
                       show_col_types = FALSE)
knitr::kable(
  rob,
  digits = 4,
  caption = "Ganador y cantidad de sobrevivientes para distintos valores de τ_FNR."
)
```
